title: caladenia multiclavia var. brevicuspis
intro: Caladenia multiclavia var. brevicuspis is a rare and endemic orchid species native to Western Australia, commonly known as a terrestrial orchid. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Caladenia multiclavia var. brevicuspis can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
